title: SELECT queries on remote table fail when using LIKE in WHERE conditions
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE remote_data (id INT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR, description TEXT);
INSERT INTO remote_data (id, name, description) VALUES (1, 'Name 1', 'First entry');
INSERT INTO remote_data (id, name, description) VALUES (2, 'Name 2', NULL);
SELECT * FROM remote_data WHERE name LIKE 'N%';
SELECT * FROM remote_data WHERE description IS NULL OR name LIKE '%1';
key_bug_features: LIKE in WHERE conditions on remote tables
